summary: Classified all five hydrated open PRs independently as inventory items. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed for this shard.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with proof and maintainer-review risk; it is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or closable item in this inventory shard.
The PR has a distinct CLI runner behavior scope and active follow-up evidence, but unresolved proof/check/review risk blocks merge or closeout.
Distinct feature/fix PR with proof and CI blockers; not safe to close as low-signal or superseded because it contains useful scoped work and contributor follow-up is still possible.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a narrow useful patch; draft state and maintainer ownership make closure inappropriate, and merge is not allowed.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a separate plugin-sdk scope; it is not duplicate/superseded/low-signal and no mutating action is permitted.
